name: Raspberry Delight
recipeIngredient: additional whipped topping and fresh mint -- optional
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine flour and sugar; blend in butter with a wooden spoon until smooth.
2. Press into an ungreased 13-in. x 9-in. x 2-in. baking pan.
3. Bake at 300 degrees for 20-25 minutes or until set (crust will not brown). Cool.
4. In a mixing bowl, beat cream cheese, confectioners' sugar, vanilla and salt until smooth.
5. Fold in whipped topping.
6. Spread over crust.
7. For topping, dissolve gelatin in boiling water; stir in raspberries.
8. Chill for 20 minutes or until mixture begins to thicken.
9. Spoon over filling.
10. Refrigerate until set.
11. Cut into squares; garnish with whipped topping and mint if desired.
Yield: 12-16 servings.
